payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Partial view of a fireplace showing a dark rectangular firebox with black interior and a dark gray stone or tile hearth ledge beneath layered painted mantel molding; left side shows a carved wooden trim partially cut off by the crop — appears to be photographed from about 1.2 m away.
attributes: dark gray stone or tile hearth
painted dark mantel molding with horizontal layers
left carved wooden trim partially visible
